business.name: J. Alan Electric LLC
business.tagline: Reliable electrical work when you need it most

hero.headline: Power Problems? *We Show Up.*
hero.subheadline: Licensed Youngstown electrician who answers the phone and fixes it right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every Wire, Every Panel, Every Problem
services_section.subheading: From blown circuits to complete rewiring — we handle the electrical work other contractors can't figure out.

services.title: Panel & Circuit Work
services.description: Breaker panels, circuit upgrades, and electrical troubleshooting. We find the problem and fix it right.

services.title: Outlet & Wiring Repair
services.description: Dead outlets, faulty wiring, and electrical mysteries solved. Fast diagnosis, permanent fixes.

services.title: Emergency Electrical
services.description: Power outages, electrical emergencies, and after-hours calls. We show up when others won't.

services.title: Fan & Fixture Installation
services.description: Ceiling fans, light fixtures, and electrical installations. Properly wired and safely mounted.

about.heading: One Call Gets It Done
about.body: We're the Youngstown electrical team that shows up when we say we will. Real electrician, real truck, real solutions.

reviews.name: Kyle B.
reviews.text: Jeff fixed our old wiring issue on very short notice and even hung our new ceiling fan. Extremely friendly and very reasonably priced.

reviews.name: reena w.
reviews.text: Fair reasonable prices and got the job done in one day! After 3 electricians never came back, Jeff actually showed up.

reviews.name: Adam M.
reviews.text: Jeff came out after hours for severed underground wires. Stayed until 9 PM working with a headlamp in a water-filled trench to restore power.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Youngstown & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response throughout the Mahoning Valley

cta.heading: Ready to Get Your Power Back?
cta.body: Call the electrician Youngstown trusts. Free quotes, honest pricing, and we actually show up.
